The place where children strike one another, holding wea-
pons, sticks and stones in their hands and shouting "Strike 1 drag !
cut 1 break I" will see danger ere long.

A house where figures of monsters or ghosts are drawn with
charcoal, red chalk etc., or a picture of the house-owner is drawn
with any of the above-named materials, will be destroyed before
long.
A house, which is full of cobwebs, where Gods are not worship-
ped at dawn and sunset, where there is constant quarrel and
where women remain unclean everyday (through their monthly
course), will go to rac and ruin.
